title: Update documentation and operator guidance for the redesigned protocol
goal: Update documentation and operator guidance so the redesigned protocol is explained consistently with plan.md and with the verified runtime behavior.
scope: Document the meaning of a transaction, single-active behavior, next_action-driven continuation, non-terminal commit, and explicit terminal end as implemented.
Document operator-facing expectations for interruption, resume, verification, commit, and terminal completion.
Document the bounded role of planning artifacts and the canonical role of runtime state.
out_of_scope: Redefining protocol semantics away from plan.md.
Changing runtime behavior except as necessary to align docs with verified behavior.
expected_outputs: Updated operator and developer guidance aligned with plan.md and verified runtime behavior.
A documentation traceability summary linking guidance statements back to plan.md and verified behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Guidance does not redefine canonical behavior away from plan.md.
Guidance clearly distinguishes canonical runtime truth from derived planning artifacts.
Guidance reflects the verified interruption, resume, commit, and terminal behaviors covered by phase 3 tests.
